groups.text: Good morning. Weather data is unavailable right now; we start with the news.

Google DeepMind has released DiffusionGemma, an experimental open model designed for exceptionally fast text generation. The new model delivers up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs, which opens the door for speed-critical local AI applications. NVIDIA has already optimized DiffusionGemma to run even faster across its GeForce RTX GPUs, the RTX PRO platform, and DGX Spark infrastructure.

This push for faster local computing coincides with a shift in European diplomacy. Hungary's new prime minister, Peter Magyar, has announced a historic minority rights deal with Ukraine. The agreement ends years of tension and clears the way for Ukraine to begin EU accession negotiations.

While diplomatic ties mend, economic friction remains high within the European Union. In the Bundestag, Friedrich Merz has warned against taking on new EU debts. Merz argues that the current coalition is failing to deliver on its promises to citizens.

Broader market signals show similar volatility in energy and capital. Renewable identification numbers for biomass-based diesel and ethanol have doubled in value since the start of the year. These RIN prices are approaching record highs due to increased U.S. biofuel blending targets. This concentration of value mirrors a wider trend in American capitalism, where power is wielded by millionaires rather than billionaires.
Weather data remains unavailable for the closing update.
And that's it for your personal morning broadcast.
[mature adult voice, intensely emotional, tender, radiant; hold a long breath after Rise] Rise... and shine.
[very very long pause before speaking; then mature adult voice, most emotional, strong, warm, radiant, deeply encouraging; hold a long breath after Rise] Rise... and shine.
